description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and extensive use of light wood paneling on its exterior. The main structure is complemented by a detached rectangular building, possibly a garage or guest house, and a large paved entryway leading to the front door. Floor-to-ceiling windows line the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. A prominent swimming pool is integrated along one side of the house, bordered by a manicured hedge and a single tall tree. The rear of the property includes a green-roofed structure and a small, enclosed garden area. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive wood paneling, large windows, a swimming pool, and a detached auxiliary building. The design is open, minimalist, and features landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, paved entryway, and detached building to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, tall hedge, and the green-roofed structure at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main and detached buildings, green-roofed structure, and garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, wood paneling, and the garden area extending from the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped floor-to-ceiling windows on front and side facades
